channel.title: Child Safety on Charlotte's AI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Child Safety on Charlotte's AI Lab

item.title: How AI Helped China Find Kidnapped Children — And Why 'Auntie Mei' Finally Got Caught
item.description: Behind the arrest of China’s most wanted child trafficker ‘Auntie Mei’ are three technologies: DNA databases, AI facial recognition, and big data tracking. Here’s what they actually did — explained for normal people.
